description: Maintained command surface manifest for the Fabric mod-essentials port. Keep this file in sync with src/main/java/com/vantablack4/essentials/EssentialsCommands.java.
reportNotes: The parity script extracts upstream EssentialsX command metadata from retained plugin.yml files and compares it to this manifest.
This manifest describes the active Fabric command surface; it is intentionally stricter than README marketing copy.
Fabric usages use Brigadier/player-facing syntax rather than Bukkit's /<command> placeholder.

commands.name: vessentials
commands.notes: Vantablack-specific status/help root.

commands.name: essentials
commands.notes: Fabric status/help root; upstream reload/version subcommands are not complete yet.

commands.name: spawn
commands.notes: Teleports caller or an admin target to configured spawn or world spawn.

commands.name: setspawn
commands.notes: Admin-only; stores default or named group spawn locations. Group selection is not permission-integrated yet.

commands.name: home
commands.notes: Self homes plus admin player-qualified online homes through the upstream player:name syntax. Bed-home and spawn-if-no-home fallback are intentionally governed by normal Fabric respawn/spawn behavior.

commands.name: sethome
commands.notes: Self homes only; fixed Fabric compatibility home limit.

commands.name: delhome
commands.notes: Deletes self homes or admin player-qualified online homes through the upstream player:name syntax.

commands.name: warp
commands.notes: Lists paginated warps or teleports caller/admin target; per-warp access is represented by Fabric command permission checks rather than Bukkit per-warp permission nodes.

commands.name: setwarp
commands.notes: Admin-only named warp set.

commands.name: delwarp
commands.notes: Admin-only named warp delete.

commands.name: balance
commands.notes: Local server-only economy balance for self plus admin target lookup by online display name, UUID, cached profile, or stored account.

commands.name: balancetop
commands.notes: Ranks persisted local balances. The upstream force form is accepted as an admin no-op because Fabric local balances are read synchronously; no Vault or backend economy provider integration.

commands.name: pay
commands.notes: Online-player/display-name payments using local balances; offline pay remains disabled like upstream without offline-pay permission.

commands.name: paytoggle
commands.notes: Persistent local accepting-pay toggle for self and admin targets.

commands.name: payconfirmtoggle
commands.notes: Persistent local confirmation preference; enabled players must repeat matching /pay within the confirmation window.

commands.name: eco
commands.notes: Admin local balance mutation with EssentialsX starting/min/max money bounds, online wildcard *, stored-account wildcard **, and percent amounts for give/take/set; offline targets require a stored account or cached Minecraft profile.

commands.name: sell
commands.notes: Sells held, matching, block, or inventory items using local worth.properties values; accepts upstream invent and stack-suffixed amounts such as 1s; named-item selling follows local economy settings.

commands.name: setworth
commands.notes: Admin item worth mutation backed by local worth.properties.

commands.name: worth
commands.notes: Calculates sell value from local worth.properties for held, matching, block, or inventory items; accepts upstream invent and stack-suffixed amounts such as 1s.

commands.name: back
commands.notes: Self back plus admin target back.

commands.name: tpa
commands.notes: Online-player/display-name request with in-memory timeout.

commands.name: tpahere
commands.notes: Online-player/display-name here request.

commands.name: tpaccept
commands.notes: Accepts latest, specific requester, or all pending requests.

commands.name: tpdeny
commands.notes: Denies latest, specific requester, or all pending requests.

commands.name: tpacancel
commands.notes: Cancels caller outgoing request for one target or all targets.

commands.name: tpaall
commands.notes: Admin request-all-to-destination flow using Fabric online players.

commands.name: tptoggle
commands.notes: Persistent per-player teleport-request toggle backed by config/mod_essentials/teleport-state.properties.

commands.name: tpauto
commands.notes: Runtime auto-accept toggle for TPA requests.

commands.name: tp
commands.notes: Admin direct teleport with display-name targets and coordinate support.

commands.name: tphere
commands.notes: Admin direct summon-to-self.

commands.name: tpo
commands.notes: Admin direct teleport that bypasses /tptoggle state.

commands.name: tpohere
commands.notes: Admin summon-to-self that bypasses /tptoggle state.

commands.name: tpall
commands.notes: Forced all-to-target teleport.

commands.name: tppos
commands.notes: Teleports to coordinates with optional yaw, pitch, and Fabric dimension argument.

commands.name: top
commands.notes: Heightmap-based safe-ish upward teleport for executor.

commands.name: heal
commands.notes: Admin self/target heal.

commands.name: feed
commands.notes: Admin self/target feed.

commands.name: fly
commands.notes: Boolean syntax is currently Brigadier true/false rather than upstream on/off.

commands.name: god
commands.notes: Boolean syntax is currently Brigadier true/false rather than upstream on/off.

commands.name: gamemode
commands.notes: Core modes and aliases exposed; no numeric mode syntax yet.

commands.name: speed
commands.notes: 0-10 Essentials-style speed mapping.

commands.name: clearinventory
commands.notes: Clears self, one online target, or all online targets with optional Fabric item filter and amount; * and ** are accepted as all-item selectors.

commands.name: clearinventoryconfirmtoggle
commands.notes: Toggles whether the same inventory-clear command must be repeated before execution.

commands.name: repair
commands.notes: Repairs held item or all damaged inventory items for online players.

commands.name: more
commands.notes: Fills the held stack up to max stack size or requested count.

commands.name: itemdb
commands.notes: Reports Fabric item registry/data component information.

commands.name: give
commands.notes: Uses Fabric item argument parsing and online player targets.

commands.name: item
commands.notes: Gives the caller a parsed Fabric item stack.

commands.name: enchant
commands.notes: Applies or removes enchantments on the held stack using data components.

commands.name: itemname
commands.notes: Sets or clears held item custom name; empty/no-argument execution clears the name like upstream.

commands.name: itemlore
commands.notes: Edits held item lore data component.

commands.name: book
commands.notes: Signs writable books, unsigns written books, and edits title/author metadata while preserving vanilla book pages.

commands.name: potion
commands.notes: Admin command setting or clearing custom potion-effect data components on held potions, splash potions, lingering potions, and tipped arrows.

commands.name: recipe
commands.notes: Searches the loaded Fabric recipe registry for matching recipe ids/displays and pages the matching recipe ids.

commands.name: skull
commands.notes: Creates player-head items with unresolved vanilla profiles. The upstream head/ehead aliases remain assigned to /hat because EssentialsX declares that alias collision too.

commands.name: hat
commands.notes: Equips held item as helmet or removes current helmet.

commands.name: enderchest
commands.notes: Opens self/online target ender chest.

commands.name: ext
commands.notes: Extinguishes self/target.

commands.name: near
commands.notes: Lists players near the executor or an online target.

commands.name: ping
commands.notes: Pong or echo message.

commands.name: getpos
commands.notes: Coordinate reporting for self/admin target.

commands.name: depth
commands.notes: Compares executor Y to dimension sea level.

commands.name: compass
commands.notes: Reports bearing and direction.

commands.name: suicide
commands.notes: Kills executor and broadcasts a death-style message.

commands.name: kill
commands.notes: Admin online target kill.

commands.name: sudo
commands.notes: Runs a command as an online target; c: broadcasts an unsigned server-side chat-style message.

commands.name: time
commands.notes: Uses Minecraft 26 clock API; supports named/tick/12h/24h values and dimension argument, not all/world selector yet.

commands.name: weather
commands.notes: Accepts the Essentials weather modes, durations, and optional Fabric dimension syntax while using the Minecraft server weather API exposed by this runtime.

commands.name: thunder
commands.notes: Direct thunder toggle with duration.

commands.name: broadcast
commands.notes: Global broadcast; alert is Fabric extra.

commands.name: broadcastworld
commands.notes: Dimension-scoped broadcast using Brigadier dimension argument.

commands.name: burn
commands.notes: Sets online target fire ticks.

commands.name: rest
commands.notes: Resets TIME_SINCE_REST and air supply for self/online target.

commands.name: list
commands.notes: Lists online players without group/vanish integration yet.

commands.name: gc
commands.notes: Reports uptime, TPS/MSPT, memory, loaded chunks, and entity counts.

commands.name: renamehome
commands.notes: Renames one of the caller's saved homes.

commands.name: warpinfo
commands.notes: Admin warp location inspection.

commands.name: world
commands.notes: Cycles or changes dimension with basic coordinate scaling.

commands.name: jump
commands.notes: Raycast teleport to the block the caller is looking at.

commands.name: bottom
commands.notes: Teleports caller downward to the nearest safe block.

commands.name: workbench
commands.notes: Opens a virtual crafting table menu.

commands.name: anvil
commands.notes: Opens a virtual anvil menu.

commands.name: cartographytable
commands.notes: Opens a virtual cartography table menu.

commands.name: grindstone
commands.notes: Opens a virtual grindstone menu.

commands.name: loom
commands.notes: Opens a virtual loom menu.

commands.name: smithingtable
commands.notes: Opens a virtual smithing table menu.

commands.name: stonecutter
commands.notes: Opens a virtual stonecutter menu.

commands.name: disposal
commands.notes: Opens a discard chest menu.

commands.name: playtime
commands.notes: Uses Minecraft play-time stat for online players.

commands.name: seen
commands.notes: Runtime session-backed seen lookup with cached profile fallback.

commands.name: whois
commands.notes: Admin online player inspection.

commands.name: realname
commands.notes: Matches online display names to account names.

commands.name: msg
commands.notes: Fabric private messages for online players/display names; respects ignore, msgtoggle, AFK notices, reply tracking, and socialspy.

commands.name: r
commands.notes: Replies to the runtime reply target tracked by /msg and /rtoggle.

commands.name: ignore
commands.notes: Durable local online-player ignore list used by /msg and /me.

commands.name: msgtoggle
commands.notes: Durable local receive-private-message toggle; admin senders bypass the receive toggle.

commands.name: rtoggle
commands.notes: Durable local reply mode toggle: on keeps the first last-recipient target, off tracks the latest sender.

commands.name: socialspy
commands.notes: Admin-only durable local spy toggle for /msg and /mail activity.

commands.name: helpop
commands.notes: Broadcasts a help request to online players with the configured admin permission level and logs it server-side.

commands.name: me
commands.notes: Broadcasts a Fabric action message to online players, respecting local /ignore for player senders.

commands.name: afk
commands.notes: Runtime AFK status with optional message, admin target support, broadcast transitions, and /msg AFK notices.

commands.name: mail
commands.notes: Durable local Fabric mail store for online, cached-profile, or name-keyed recipients; supports timed sendtemp expiry, sendtempall for online players, clear <player> [number], and console send shortcut. Offline Bukkit user migration and all-known-user sendall are not implemented.

commands.name: nick
commands.notes: Durable server-side entity custom/display nickname for online players. Full Bukkit tab-list and signed-chat display-name parity needs a mixin/packet bridge.

commands.name: toggleshout
commands.notes: Durable local shout preference only; mod-roleplay owns live roleplay chat formatting.

commands.name: motd
commands.notes: Displays configurable text from config/mod_essentials/text/motd.txt.

commands.name: rules
commands.notes: Displays configurable text from config/mod_essentials/text/rules.txt.

commands.name: info
commands.notes: Displays configurable text from config/mod_essentials/text/info.txt or chapter files.

commands.name: ban
commands.notes: Admin command backed by Minecraft's UserBanList; online targets are disconnected immediately.

commands.name: tempban
commands.notes: Admin command backed by Minecraft's expiring UserBanListEntry; accepts s/m/h/d/w/M/y durations.

commands.name: unban
commands.notes: Removes a local Minecraft user ban.

commands.name: banip
commands.notes: Admin command backed by Minecraft's IpBanList; accepts an IP, an online player, or a player remembered by config/mod_essentials/logout-locations.properties. Matching online players are disconnected.

commands.name: tempbanip
commands.notes: Expiring IP ban backed by Minecraft's IpBanListEntry; player targets use the last IP observed on Fabric join/disconnect.

commands.name: unbanip
commands.notes: Removes a local Minecraft IP ban; player targets use the last IP observed on Fabric join/disconnect.

commands.name: kick
commands.notes: Disconnects one online player through the server connection.

commands.name: kickall
commands.notes: Disconnects all online players except the player command sender.

commands.name: mute
commands.notes: Durable local mute state in config/mod_essentials/mutes.properties enforced through Fabric's server chat and signed command-message allow events. /unmute and /eunmute are unmute-only; non-duration second arguments become permanent mute reasons like upstream.

commands.name: setjail
commands.notes: Admin command storing a named StoredLocation-style jail in config/mod_essentials/jails.properties.

commands.name: deljail
commands.notes: Deletes a named jail location.

commands.name: togglejail
commands.notes: Durable local jail assignment with online teleport and server-tick jail-boundary enforcement.

commands.name: jails
commands.notes: Lists local jail locations.

commands.name: jailedplayers
commands.notes: Lists locally jailed players.

commands.name: tpr
commands.notes: Random teleport into the configured area with world-border, liquid, collision, and floor safety checks.

commands.name: settpr
commands.notes: Admin command configuring random teleport center/radius from the sender's current location.

commands.name: kit
commands.notes: Durable local NBT-backed kits with per-player cooldowns; admin target delivery bypasses self cooldown.

commands.name: createkit
commands.notes: Admin command snapshots the sender's online inventory, armor, and offhand into a component-preserving Fabric kit file.

commands.name: delkit
commands.notes: Deletes a local kit and its cooldown entries.

commands.name: showkit
commands.notes: Lists stored kit stacks and cooldown.

commands.name: kitreset
commands.notes: Admin command clearing durable kit cooldown state for online targets.

commands.name: invsee
commands.notes: Admin command opening a live online target inventory in a padded six-row Fabric container.

commands.name: exp
commands.notes: Admin point-based experience show/set/give/reset for online players.

commands.name: ptime
commands.notes: Persistent player-specific clock packet preference with online-player and * loops; relative-vs-fixed @ semantics are not fully modeled.

commands.name: pweather
commands.notes: Persistent player-specific weather packet preference with online-player and * loops.

commands.name: condense
commands.notes: Converts all or one requested common vanilla nugget/ingot/gem/raw resource into compacted forms; recipe-derived/custom mod compaction is not complete.

commands.name: unlimited
commands.notes: Admin durable per-player unlimited held-item refill implemented through server ticks for online players.

commands.name: powertool
commands.notes: Admin durable right-click command binding for the held item type.

commands.name: powertoollist
commands.notes: Lists the caller's durable powertool bindings.

commands.name: powertooltoggle
commands.notes: Admin toggle for durable powertool execution state.

commands.name: backup
commands.notes: Admin command invoking synchronous player and world saves; external shell backup command integration is not configured in this Fabric port.

commands.name: customtext
commands.notes: Reads paginated UTF-8 text files from config/mod_essentials/text/custom.

commands.name: help
commands.notes: Keeps vanilla /help when already present; Essentials aliases page the live Brigadier command tree.

commands.name: lightning
commands.notes: Spawns lightning at the looked block or at an online target.

commands.name: antioch
commands.notes: Throws one or more primed TNT entities from the caller.

commands.name: nuke
commands.notes: Drops upstream-style TNT clusters over online players; numeric amount remains as a Fabric extension for the looked location.

commands.name: fireball
commands.notes: Launches Fabric projectile equivalents for fireball, small, large, arrow, skull, egg, snowball, expbottle, dragon, splashpotion, lingeringpotion, trident, and windcharge.

commands.name: beezooka
commands.notes: Launches a bee entity from the caller.

commands.name: kittycannon
commands.notes: Launches a cat entity from the caller.

commands.name: break
commands.notes: Breaks the block the caller is looking at.

commands.name: ice
commands.notes: Applies vanilla freeze ticks to caller or online target.

commands.name: tree
commands.notes: Places a vanilla configured tree feature at the looked block; supports common Essentials tree type names.

commands.name: bigtree
commands.notes: Places a larger vanilla configured tree feature at the looked block where a large variant exists.

commands.name: spawnmob
commands.notes: Spawns summonable Fabric entity types near caller or online target.

commands.name: spawner
commands.notes: Changes the looked mob spawner block to a summonable Fabric entity type using the vanilla spawner block entity API.

commands.name: editsign
commands.notes: Admin command editing/copying/pasting the front/back text of the looked sign through the vanilla sign block entity API; Bukkit SignChangeEvent hooks are not replicated.

commands.name: remove
commands.notes: Removes nearby or loaded-world non-player entities matching Essentials categories, comma-separated categories, or Fabric entity registry ids.

commands.name: firework
commands.notes: Edits held firework rocket data components and can launch copies from the caller. Metadata supports color, fade, shape, effect, and power tokens.

commands.name: vanish
commands.notes: Admin command toggling the vanilla invisible flag for online players. Full Bukkit/Paper vanished-player tracking requires a packet/list hook.

commands.name: discordbroadcast
commands.notes: Registered as an explicit compatibility root that reports EssentialsX Discord broadcast is not configured until a Fabric Discord bridge module is wired.

commands.name: discord
commands.notes: Registered as an explicit compatibility root that reports EssentialsX Discord is not configured until a Fabric Discord bridge module is wired.

commands.name: link
commands.notes: Registered as an explicit compatibility root that reports EssentialsX DiscordLink is not configured until a Fabric Discord account-link bridge is wired.

commands.name: unlink
commands.notes: Registered as an explicit compatibility root that reports EssentialsX DiscordLink is not configured until a Fabric Discord account-link bridge is wired.

commands.name: setxmpp
commands.notes: Registered as an explicit compatibility root that reports EssentialsXMPP is not configured.

commands.name: xmpp
commands.notes: Registered as an explicit compatibility root that reports EssentialsXMPP is not configured.

commands.name: xmppspy
commands.notes: Registered as an explicit compatibility root that reports EssentialsXMPP spy is not configured.

commands.name: tpoffline
commands.notes: Teleports the command sender to the target player's last logout location captured by Fabric join/disconnect events in config/mod_essentials/logout-locations.properties. This matches upstream's stored logout-location behavior without mutating offline player NBT; it only works after the target has been observed by this Fabric port.
